trivia_bullets.text: Reckless Detective is a red 0/3 Creature with type Devil Detective — the Scryfall type line confirms Devil, not Goblin as the vision pass tentatively categorized. Devils are a distinct Ravnica creature type (associated with chaos and Rakdos) that visually overlap with Goblins but carry a separate creature type [Scryfall].

When it attacks, the controller may sacrifice an artifact or discard a card; if they do, draw a card and this creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. The 0/3 base power with +2/+0 on attack gives it 2/3 offensive stats while keeping a defensive blocker profile. It is an uncommon, not pauper-legal, unlike most of this batch [Scryfall legalities].

Flavor text: "He's gonna crack this thing wide open." — No speaker attributed [Scryfall]. The unattributed declarative reads as crowd commentary — someone watching the reckless detective charge in. The confidence of the claim against the chaos of the depicted action is the joke.
Artist Tuan Duong Chu. Previewed by German outlet 4players on 2024-01-19 [Scryfall preview data]. EDHREC rank 19527 [Scryfall].
